en: And actually, you worked with Benedict. We did, yeah.
ko: 사실, 너는 베네딕트와 함께 일했어. 맞아, 그랬어.

en: Yes, August O'Sage County. Yes, you did.
ko: 응, 오거스트 오세이지 카운티. 맞아, 너희가 그랬지.

en: And were you at Wimbledon together as well? Well... Julia was sat next to me.
OK. Which I thought, oh, great, I'm between my husband and Benedict.
This is going to be great. But we were in a very special seating.
In the royal box, you could say. We were in the royal box.
Which I was very excited about until I realised...
Well, until Benedict pointed out to me that I gasp
every time the ball is struck. It was like a scene out of Pretty Woman. It was amazing.
ko: 왕실 박스에서는 조용히 있어야 하는데- 마치 프리티 우먼의 한 장면 같았어.
정말 놀라웠어. 그녀는, 우와! 아, 우와! 아, 우와!

en: It's impossible to be quiet in a scenario like...
It's so exciting. It's so exciting. But Benedict had his tie and he was like...
ko: 하지만 베네딕트는 넥타이를 매고 있었고, 그는 이렇게 말했어,

en: And he said, Julia. And it's like, they hit the ball, they go...
They hit the ball, they go... He's like, Julia, really? It's going to happen all day.
It's going to happen a lot today. If they're lucky.
